title: best measuring cups for herbalists
description: These measuring cup features a top viewing for easy measurement readings, allowing apothecary professionals to accurately assess the quantity of various liquid types being measured. The easy pouring design minimizes spills or drips, making it ideal for measuring liquids of different viscosities and consistencies.
